query:
-- Step 3: Convert range "A6–B6" → "6A–6B"
-- Handle both dash variants (en-dash – and hyphen -)
UPDATE order_tracking
SET outboundLocation = '6A–6B'
WHERE outboundLocation IN ('A6–B6', 'A6-B6');
command:

-- Handle both dash variants (en-dash – and hyphen -)
